Vitaly fixes the jobs your home keeps reminding you about.

What Vitaly can help with

Small repairs, smart upgrades, and the work that makes a place feel finished.

Book one job or build a punch list. Vitaly can help prioritize the work, suggest practical fixes, and keep the project moving.

General home repairs

Drywall patches, doors, trim, small carpentry, hardware, adjustments, and household fixes.

Painting & refinishing

Interior painting, cabinet touch-ups, door refinishing, and clean refreshes before listing or renting.

Light electrical

Fixture swaps, lighting updates, and pot light coordination with an electrician when needed.

Minor plumbing

Faucets, shower heads, toilets, vanities, simple leak fixes, and bathroom hardware updates.

Basements & small renos

Basement finishing tasks, small renovation support, trim-outs, and SnapClip ceiling installation.

Seasonal services

Snow removal and seasonal property help for homeowners, rentals, and small managed properties.

Clean repairs and practical improvements around Regina homes.

How it works

Simple booking, clear expectations, no mystery.

Send a few details, add photos if helpful, and Vitaly will respond with the next step.

1

Tell Vitaly what is wrong

Use the form or call with the repair, address area, and timing.

2

Get a practical plan

Vitaly confirms the scope, materials, and what can be handled in one visit.

3

Work gets done cleanly

Repairs are completed with care for your walls, floors, and daily routine.

4

Keep the list moving

Add the next small fix while Vitaly is there or book a follow-up.

Call or send details

Ask Vitaly about your next repair.
